upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pratanvatIrozaDIrAvadAmi' (aTarva॰8.7.4) pratanvatIH=prakawayantIH
'yA Satena pratanozi sahasreRa virohasi' (vA॰saM॰13.21) SatapratAnA BavasItyarTaH tanotirihAkarmakaH
'KyAtastvaM viBavEryaSAMsi kavayo dikzu pratanvanti naH' (Bartf॰) vistArayantItyarTaH
'tadUrIkftya kftiBirvAcaspatyaM pratAyate' (SiSu॰2.30) pratAyate praTyate darSyata ityarTaH
'(sirAH) nAByAM nibadDAH pratanvanti samantataH' (suSrute 1.354.5) pratatA vitatA BavantItyarTaH
'SataM tava pratAnAstrayastriMSannitAnAH' (aTarva॰6.139.1) pratAnAH SiKAH
'bIjakARqaruhARyeva pratAnA vallaya eva ca' (manu॰1.48) pratAnAstantuyuktAstrapuzAlAbUpraBftaya iti kullUkaH -
'pippalIpratataM vanam' (rA॰3.76.25) pippalIBirAkIrRaM parigatamityarTaH
'apatyaM kasmAt apatataM Bavati' (ni0 41) pituH sakASAdetya pfTagiva BavatIti durgaH
'tvo'patataH' (ni0 3205) apatataH=apetya tataH (durgaH)
'saMraSmiBistatanaH sUryasya' (f॰7.2.1) santatanaH saMyuNgDi
'aDvaryuM nizkrAmantaM prastotA santanuyAt' (lAwyA॰SrO॰1.11.2) tamanu baDnIyAt anupadamanugacCedityAha
'yajYena yajYaM santanoti santataM hyevAsyEtad vrataM Bavati' (Sa॰brA॰3.2.2.7) santanoti sambaDnAti avicCinnaM karoti
'aBojanena santanuyAdityeke' (drA॰gf॰2.2.9) avicCinnaM kuryAdityarTaH
'adBirevAsyA etatkzataM vilizwaM santanoti' (Sa॰brA॰6.4.3.1) santanoti sandaDAti
'mAlyESca viviDEH… santatA SuSuBe BUmiH' (rA॰5.14.46) santatAvavyAptA=AkIrRA
'aparopyavalaprARaH kfSo DamanisantataH' (BA॰vana॰9.12) DamanisantataH=sirAvyAptaH CAtatvAnnirmAMsaprAyatvAtsandfzwaDamanIkaH DamanIla iti yAvat
'arTasantatikAmaSca rakzedetAni nityaSaH' (BA॰u॰39.38) arTasantatiH=arTAnAmavicCedena vfdDiH
'te vE devASca fzayaScAdriyanta samAnena yajYaM santanavAmeti' (E0 brA0 617) santanavAma SlizwaM karavAma
'brahman santanu Sizyasya karmacCidraM vitanvataH' (BA0 pu0 82314) santanu=saMsIvya loRmaDyamEkavacane rUpam
'idaM me prAtaHsavanaM mADyandinaM savanamanusantanuta' (CAM0 3162) anusantanuta=anusantate anukramabadDe sampAdayata yaTA me prAtaH savanaM mADyandinena savanenAnusriyatAm
'idaM me'yaM vIryaM putro'nusantanavat' (Sa0 brA0 12414) anusantanavat=anusantanuyAt=uttaratrAvicCedena nayet
'anu dyAvApfTivI AtatAna' (tE0 brA0 12123) anvAtatAna vyApa vyAptavAn
'yadAtatamava tattanu' (aTarva0 7953) yacCepo jArasyAtatamAyataM tadavatataM dErGyarahitaM kuru saMkocaya avataniH saMkocane vartate
'asaMKyAtA sahasrARi yee rudrA aDi BUmyAm tezAM sahasrayojane'va DanvAni tanmasi' (vA0 saM0 1654) avatanmasi=avatanmaH=avaropayAmaH ujjyAni kurma ityarTaH
'ava jyAmiva Danvano manyuM tanomi te hfdaH' (aTarva0 6421) avatanomi=vyapakarzAmi
'divo malamavatataM pfTivyA aDyuttatam' (aTarva0 273) avatatam=avANmuKaM prasftam uttatam=UrDvaM tatam
'ayoDyAyAmavatatA sA vyatIyAya SarvarI' (rA0 2671) avatatA=dIrGIBUtA
'latASatEravatatA nadI' (rA0 51426) avatatA=AcCAditA
'jvalitikasanteByo RaH' (pA0 31140) ityatra tanoterRa upasaMKyAnam iti vArttikam avatanotItyavatAnaH avatAna ullocaScandrodayaH
'avatAnEstaTA gulmErmaYjarIjAlaDAriBiH' (BA0 saBA0 93) avatAnEH=latApratAnEH
'avatatya DanuzwvaM sahasrAkza SatezuDe' (vA0 saM0 1613) DanurapagatajyAkaM kftvA
'fjvIrdaDAnEravatatya kanDarAH' (SiSu0 1218) avatatya=nIcErAyamya
'Kamavatatya saliladAH' (bf0 saM0 2419) AkASamAcCAdyetyarTaH
'vfkzasTo'vatAno vfkze cCinnepi na vinaSyati' (pA0 1264 sUtre BAzye) avatAno'DomuKaH pratAnaH
'paro mUjavato'tIhyavatataDanvA' (tE0 saM0 186) avatAritajyAkaM Danuryasya sa iti BawwaBAskaraH jyAkarzaRena vistAritaDanuzka iti tu sAyaRaH ayaM pramAdaH ayameka AcAryasya mfzyatAm
'tvam agne sapraTA asi juzwo hotA vareRyaH tvayA yajYaM vitanvate' (f0 5134) vitanvate=anutizWanti
'virAwaparvapradyotI BAvadIpo vitanyate' (nIlakaRWaH) vitanyate viracyate praRIyate
'DyAtaScetasi kOtukaM vitanute kopopi vAmaBruvaH' (sA0 da0) vitanute=karoti=janayati
'smarasi ruditEH snehAkUtaM taTA vyatanodasO' (mAlatI0 911) vyatanot vyAYjayat AviraBAvayat
'tena vIryaM vitanvatA' (rA0 4989) vitanvatA=prakawayatA
'brahman santanuSizyasya karmacCidraM vitanvataH' (BA0 pu0 82314) vitanvato yajYaM tanvAnasya ata eva vitAno yajYo Bavati taTA cAmaraH paWati--kratuvistArayorastrI vitAnaM trizu tucCake
'ata eva ca vEtAnAstvAM vahnayaH pAvayantu' (SA0 48) ityatra vEtAnA yajYiyAH vitAnamullocopi yaccandrodaya ityAcakzate
'SreRIbanDAd vitanvadBirastamBAM toraRasrajam' (raGu0 141) vitanvadBiH=viracayadBiH
'amuM yajYaM vitatameyAya' (CAM0 u0 1107) vitataM cirAya tAyamAnam
'vitatayajYaH' (SA0 734) anuzWitADvaraH
'yajvaBiH saMBftaM havyaM vitatezvaDvarezu saH' (ku0 246) ukto'rTaH
'vitatavapuzA mahAhinA' (ki0 1222) mahAkAyenetyarTaH
'Bavati vitataSvAsonnAhapraRunnapayoDaram' (mAlatI0 1015) vitato'viSrAntaH=avirataH

'vaMSavitatizu vizaktapfTupriyavAlaDiBiH' (ki0 1247) vaMSavitatayaH=veRuzaRqAH
'yadakAlameGavitatirvyayUyujat' (mAlatI0 947) vitatiH paNktiH
'SfNgocCrAyEryo vitatya sTitaH Kam' (meGa0 60) vyApyetyarTaH
'vitatya kiratoH SarAn' (uttara0 61) DanurAkfzyetyAha
'tatra hatvA paSUnmaDyAn vitatyAyatane SuBe' (hari0 21611) vitatya havIrUpeRa nirupya
'bahUnAM vitatA yajYA dvijAnAM ya ihAgatAH tezAM samAptirAyattA tava vatsa nivartane' (rA0 24528).. vitatAH pravartitA anuzWIyamAnA vitAyamAnAH
'prastArasTagitA ivonmuKamaRijyotirvitAnErdiSaH' (mAlatI 65) vitAnaH samUhaH

'vitAnezvapyevaM tava mama ca some viDiraBUt' (veRI0 630) vitAno yajYaH kratuH
'sa yaTA spandanAM rajjuBi rvyapatatya duhyuH' (jE0 brA0 23) vyapatatya parito badDvA
'viyati vyatyatanvAtAM mUrtI haripayoniDI' (Bawwi0 83) vyativistAritavantO sparDayeti gamyate atra yaTAkaTaMcitkarmavyatihAro vyAKyeyaH
'nedAnIM pItiraSvinA tatAna' (f0 5763) pItiH pAnaM somapITo nAtatAna na pratIkzate ityAha

'A dyAM tanozi raSmiBiH' (f0 4528) Atanozi vyApnozi
